products.name: Rameswaram Premium Nethili Karuvadu
products.description:
Experience the authentic taste of the coast with Rameswaram Dry Fish's Premium Nethili Karuvadu. Our dried anchovies are handpicked and processed using traditional sun-drying methods, ensuring they retain their natural flavor and nutritional value. The 'Nethili' variety is beloved in Tamil cuisine for its small size and intense, savory flavor, making it a perfect addition to many classic South Indian recipes.

Our product is processed under stringent quality standards. We use only fresh fish and natural sea salt, with absolutely no added chemicals or colorings.

AUTHENTIC RAMESWARAM CATCH: Sourced directly from the clean coastal waters of Rameswaram, ensuring authentic flavor and premium quality.
100% NATURAL & SUN-DRIED: Our Nethili Karuvadu is cleaned thoroughly and dried under strict hygienic conditions. No chemicals or artificial preservatives are added.
RESEALABLE FRESHNESS: Comes in an easy-open, resealable standing pouch to maintain quality and aroma after opening.
NUTRITIOUS & FLAVORFUL: A rich source of protein and essential minerals. These dried anchovies add a profound umami flavor to traditional dishes.
VERSATILE KITCHEN STAPLE: Perfect for making crispy Nethili fry, spicy Thokku (dried fish masala), or traditional Meen Kuzhambu (fish curry).

products.name: Premium Podi Nethili Karuvadu
products.description:
Bring the authentic taste of the coast straight to your kitchen with Rameswaram Dry Fish - Podi Nethili Karuvadu. Sourced directly from small boats to guarantee the freshest catch, our small anchovies are cleaned and sun-dried under strict hygienic conditions. Whether you are making a spicy Nethili Karuvadu Thokku, a crispy fry, or a rich traditional kuzhambu, these bite-sized dried fish deliver a punch of rich, savory umami flavor to every meal.

Why Choose Our Podi Nethili?
100% Natural: Just premium fish and sea salt. Absolutely no added chemicals or artificial preservatives.

Ready to Cook: Carefully cleaned and prepared. Just wash with lukewarm water and it is ready for your pan.

Premium Quality Packaging: Packed in an easy-open, resealable pouch with a transparent window so you can see the quality for yourself.

Incredible Value: Authentic coastal taste at affordable prices.

Ingredients: Fresh Fish, Sea Salt.
Storage Instructions: Store in a cool, dry place. Keep in an airtight container once opened. Keep in the refrigerator to maintain ultimate freshness.

products.name: Kilicha Fish Karuvadu
products.description:
Rameswaram Kilicha Karuvadu – Simply Fresh, Purely Dried. Craving the authentic taste of the coast? Our Kilicha Karuvadu is 100% natural, hygienic, and packed with traditional flavor.

Freshly Sourced: Brought in daily by local small boats.
Purely Sun-Dried: No chemicals, no additives, just pure fish and sea salt.
Ready-to-Cook: Cleaned with care so you can cook with confidence.
Sustainable: Supporting traditional fishing communities with every pack.

products.name: Premium Sennakuni Karuvadu
products.description: Premium Sennakuni - authentic coastal delight. Intense, savory crunch perfect for thokku, fry, or adding to vegetable curries.

products.name: Premium Vaalai Karuvadu
products.description:
Experience the authentic, traditional taste of coastal Tamil Nadu with our premium Vaalai Karuvadu (Ribbon Fish). Sourced directly from local small-boat fishermen, our Ribbon Fish is processed under strict hygienic conditions to ensure you receive only the finest quality.

Every batch is meticulously cleaned and sun-dried to lock in that deep, savory umami flavor that food lovers cherish. Whether you are planning to prepare a spicy, aromatic Karuvadu Kuzhambu (dried fish curry) or a crispy Karuvadu Varuval (fry), our premium Vaalai Karuvadu provides the perfect texture and bold taste to elevate your home-cooked meals.

Why choose our Vaalai Karuvadu?
100% Natural: No added chemicals or preservatives. Just pure, sun-dried goodness.
Sustainably Sourced: We support local small-scale fishers for the freshest catch.
Hygienically Processed: Cleaned and dried in a controlled environment to ensure food safety.
Convenient Packaging: Our easy-open, resealable pouch keeps your fish fresh for longer and makes storage effortless.

products.name: Rameswaram Premium Masi Thool Karuvadu
products.description:
Elevate your coastal cooking with the intense, savory depth of our premium Masi Thool. Sourced from the finest catch and prepared using traditional methods, our Masi Thool (dry fish powder/mix) is the secret ingredient that transforms everyday meals into gourmet experiences. Whether you are crafting authentic seafood dishes, flavoring a spicy meen kulambu, or adding a rich, umami punch to your stir-fries and chutneys, this is the essential pantry staple for every seafood lover.

Why You'll Love It:
Authentic Traditional Flavor: Perfectly dried to lock in that deep, smoky, and concentrated fish essence that defines authentic coastal cuisine.
Premium Quality: We take pride in our sourcing and hygiene, ensuring you receive only the cleanest, highest-grade dry fish.
Highly Versatile: A tiny sprinkle goes a long way.
Rich in Protein: A nutrient-dense, shelf-stable ingredient that adds a healthy protein boost to your diet.

products.name: Rameswaram Premium Kaintha Iraal Karuvadu
products.description:
Bring the rich, savory essence of the sea straight to your kitchen with our premium Kaintha Iraal Karuvadu. Sourced directly from small-boat fishers and sun-dried under strict hygienic conditions, our dried prawns retain the natural, robust flavor that defines traditional coastal cuisine.

Packed with protein and free from artificial preservatives, our dried prawns are the perfect pantry staple for elevating your everyday cooking. Whether you are crafting a spicy Karuvaadu Thokku, adding depth to a fragrant sambar, or creating a crunchy stir-fry, these premium prawns offer unmatched quality in every bite.
products.shortDesc: Premium sun-dried prawns - authentic coastal flavor

Ingredients: Fresh Fish, Sea Salt
Additives: None (100% Natural)

products.name: Premium Thundu Karuvadu
products.description:
Bring the authentic, rustic flavors of the coast to your kitchen. Our Thundu Karuvadu is crafted for those who love the deep, savory, and umami-rich taste of traditional sun-dried fish but want the convenience of ready-to-cook pieces. Sourced directly from small-scale traditional boats, each piece is expertly cleaned and sun-dried under strict hygienic conditions to ensure you receive only the best quality.

Why You'll Love It:
Authentic Coastal Taste: We use a time-tested, 100% natural sun-drying process that locks in the rich, deep flavors that only real karuvadu can provide.
Zero Chemicals: Absolutely no additives or preservatives. Just pure, wholesome, dried fish cured with high-quality sea salt.
Ready-to-Cook Convenience: Say goodbye to the hassle of cleaning and cutting. Our 'Thundu' (chunk) cuts are perfectly portioned so you can drop them straight into your spicy karuvadu kuzhambu or fry them up for a crispy, flavorful side dish.
products.shortDesc: Salted dried fish chunks - ready to cook
